name: Nicotinamide riboside in aged men's skeletal muscle
summary: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial of 1 g/day nicotinamide riboside for 21 days in aged men, with skeletal-muscle NAD-metabolome, transcriptomic, inflammatory, and mitochondrial bioenergetic endpoints.
population: Aged men, median age about 75 years

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and safety in Aged men, median age about 75 years. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
